commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/llm/providers/anthropic.ts` to compute the OAuth `claude-cli/*` user-agent from `claude --version` with a cached fallback instead of the hardcoded `2.1.75`.

PR surface: Source +22. Total +22 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the stale-header portion: current live base has both Anthropic OAuth HTTP paths building `claude-cli/2.1.75`. I did not run a live Anthropic OAuth request because that requires valid user credentials.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs human-visible contributor proof and maintainer review for the auth-path command-execution boundary; ClawSweeper should not queue an automated repair while the external real-behavior proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(anthropic): read claudeCodeVersion at runtime to prevent stale user-agent bearer auth failures
target.author: spric76
